content.full_text:
June 28, 2002

Evelyn Halsey
9165 Purrington Court
Sacramento, CA 95829

RE: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-02-172

Dear Ms. Halsey:

Pursuant to our telephone conversation of June 27, 2002, you have withdrawn your request for written advice.

If you have any additional questions, please feel free to call me toll-free at 866/275-3772.

Sincerely,

Kevin S. Moen, PhD
Political Reform Consultant II
Technical Assistance Division
